design_philosophy: A modern, student-focused gamified education platform. It blends 'Soft Utility' with 'Parisian Elegance'. Bright but elegant colors, high-contrast readable typography, soft gradients, and playful structural layouts. Not childish—suitable for teens and college students. The interface emphasizes progressive mastery through visual hierarchy and generous negative space.

anti_patterns: Do not use Inter for headings
Do not jump more than 2 scale steps between heading and subheading

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind Scale). Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Focus on visual breathing room.

cards.style: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors shadow-sm hover:shadow
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary-light text-secondary font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-secondary transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-secondary hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors

inputs.style: border-border bg-white rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all

progress_bars.fill: bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-accent rounded-full h-full transition-all duration-500

shadcn_overrides.Card: Use custom structural layout over Shadcn Card for complex gamified UI to allow asymmetrical layers.
shadcn_overrides.Dialog: Add backdrop-blur-sm to overlay. Make content rounded-2xl.
shadcn_overrides.Tabs: Use rounded-full for tab lists, soft colored background for active tab instead of default boxy look.

icons.usage: Use 24px/32px for section headers, 16px/20px for inline text. Rely on vibrant primary/accent colors for icons in the dashboard.

images.description: Soft pastel gradient with a subtle texture. Use as a background for the hero section or full page wrappers.
images.usage_instructions: Apply as an absolute background with opacity 40% behind the hero content.

images.description: Elegant Parisian building with traditional rooftops.
images.usage_instructions: Use in the marketing page hero or 'About the Course' section in a rounded-3xl container or bento grid item.
Use in the community/social proof section of the landing page.
Use as an avatar placeholder or feature section imagery.

images.description: Abstract shapes mimicking an institutional logo.
images.usage_instructions: Use in the 'Trusted By' or 'Partner Institutions' marquee strip.
Use in the 'Trusted By' marquee strip.
Use in the 'Trusted By' marquee strip.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on primary blue/red backgrounds is white. Focus rings must use ring-primary.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes.

specific_page_instructions.marketing_home: Use a wide, asymmetric Bento grid for features. Hero should have a generous padding. Introduce the '7-Month Roadmap' visually here with a sweeping curved SVG path.
specific_page_instructions.student_dashboard: Strict, clean 'Control Room' grid. Mobile-first. Circular XP indicator at the top left, current streak flame icon. Next lesson card takes up the hero spot of the dashboard. Cardless design with subtle 1px borders.
specific_page_instructions.practice_labs: Immersive view. Hide main navigation or collapse it to minimize distractions. Use large, legible text (text-3xl) for French phrases. Playful success animations on correct answers.
specific_page_instructions.ai_tutor: Chat interface. Differentiate user and AI messages using background colors (User: Primary, AI: Soft Slate/White). Add a typing indicator animation.
specific_page_instructions.mini_games: Use vibrant colors here. Break out of the standard grid into a full-width container. Include floating elements.
specific_page_instructions.admin_panel: Standard Shadcn tables. Dense, high data visibility. No playful gradients here, keep it strictly functional.
